steps: GET /api/providers/evaluations/criterios — verify lists >= 33 criteria
Verify each item has: seleccion_evaluacion, proveedor_de, aspecto, parametro, puntaje
Verify criteria cover all 9 aspects: Precios, Plazo de pago, Calidad, Plazo de Cumplimiento, Ubicacion, Atencion al cliente, SGC, SGSST, SGA

features.description: CRUD for Evaluacion Proveedor with auto-scoring
steps: POST /api/providers/evaluations/evaluaciones with 9 criteria scores — verify 201
Verify puntaje auto-calculated as sum of 9 criteria
Verify resultado auto-derived: score <= 10 -> 'Pesimo', <= 12 -> 'Regular', <= 15 -> 'Bueno', <= 18 -> 'Muy Bueno', <= 20 -> 'Excelente'
Verify accion auto-derived based on resultado
GET /api/providers/evaluations/evaluaciones — verify paginated list
GET /api/providers/evaluations/evaluaciones/{id} — verify all 9 criteria + puntaje + resultado
PUT /api/providers/evaluations/evaluaciones/{id} — verify score recalculates
DELETE /api/providers/evaluations/evaluaciones/{id} — verify 204
Create evaluation with all minimum scores (total ~9) — verify resultado = 'Pesimo', accion = 'Buscar otros proveedores'
Create evaluation with mid scores (total ~14) — verify resultado = 'Bueno', accion = 'Se continua trabajando'
Create evaluation with max scores (total 20) — verify resultado = 'Excelente'
GET /api/providers/evaluations/evaluaciones/proveedor/{ruc} — verify returns evaluations for specific provider
Verify returns empty array for non-existent RUC
GET /api/providers/evaluations/evaluaciones?resultado=Bueno — verify filter works
Verify only evaluations with 'Bueno' resultado returned

features.description: Evaluacion list page with score badges
steps: Navigate to /providers/evaluaciones
Verify aero-data-grid columns: ruc, razon_social, puntaje, resultado (badge colored by score), fecha_evaluacion
Verify badge colors: red for Pesimo, orange for Regular, yellow for Bueno, green for Muy Bueno/Excelente
Verify filter bar with resultado filter
Click row — verify navigates to detail

features.description: Evaluacion form with 9-criteria scoring and real-time calculation
steps: Navigate to /providers/evaluaciones/new
Verify form has: proveedor selector (RUC + razon_social), 9 criteria dropdowns
Each criteria dropdown shows parametro text with puntaje values from criterio catalog
Select values for all 9 criteria — verify real-time puntaje sum updates
Verify resultado label updates dynamically based on puntaje
Submit — verify creation with correct auto-calculated fields
Navigate to /providers/evaluaciones/{id}
Verify entity-detail-shell layout
Verify all 9 criteria displayed with their scores
Verify total puntaje and resultado prominently displayed
Verify accion recommendation displayed

features.description: Backend tests for evaluacion proveedor pass
steps: Run: npm run test:backend
Verify test_evaluacion_proveedor.py passes all tests including scoring logic
Verify no regressions
